The Hundred Women Auction: Five Young Domestic Players to Watch

Mar 8, 2026 • 8JJ Cricket

The Hundred Women Auction: Five Young Domestic Players to Watch

The upcoming Women’s Hundred auction is expected to highlight some of the most exciting young talents in English domestic cricket. With teams looking to strengthen their squads, several emerging players could attract significant attention from franchises hoping to invest in the future of the competition.

These young cricketers have already impressed in domestic tournaments and development pathways, demonstrating both skill and composure at an early stage of their careers. Their performances have made them strong contenders to secure valuable contracts in the upcoming auction.

Among the players to watch are talented batters, spinners, and all-rounders who have shown the ability to perform under pressure. Their continued growth could not only impact the upcoming Hundred season but also strengthen England’s long-term depth in women’s cricket.

As the auction approaches, franchises will carefully assess potential recruits, balancing immediate performance with long-term development. For many young domestic players, this event could represent a major step forward in their professional careers.
